reviews.review_description: There is no English mode or anything like it if I can't read the cards it's a bad game

Originally gave this 5 stars, but after doing some digging, this game only came into existence as a training exercise for a dev at Bandai. For sure, Bandai is not gonna continue this unless they're gonna get top dollar profits from it.

reviews.review_title: This is what we want from YGO SolidLight
reviews.review_description:
It's like Final Fantasy meets YGO meets Cardcaptur Sakura meets Hearthstone.
Suggestions:
1. Add multilingual support
2. Add multiplayer pvp with a hangout area
3. Add paid cosmetics with earnable booster packs for cards (along with earnable cards) to keep the game free to play, which will encourage a strong community. 
Let's hope this can stay balanced for more than a single expansion 😍
This game has the potential to get a lot of fans if it becomes more than a beta. Don't give up on games less than a year old before they even find their audience.
I wish, you would add a multiplayer feature sonn

I love the concept of the card but I do have a card game made by the creators that made this I hope they add on to the game and make it real so people without for can enjoy too it’s really fun if there’s updates that could make the game better with a world wide variety of cards and open game world so you can find and battle monsters to get there cards so you become more powerful and also make the game multiplayer so you can have a friend there next to you it’s like Pokémon but more interesting like there are Sheild cards not mostly just beast cards it has a variety of different cards that people will love to get that deck more popular but if the developers see this I’m gonna try to make it a real card game because I know this is a dream card game where the things your are fighting are actually there but that cool card mechanic on your arm dispenses 1 card at a time and if I do the concept of using springs to push the cards up then it’s the same going in but I hope they developers make this into a real card game and also add more to this game if anything happens then I can’t wait to see what more they add to the game or if they make a real card game but in the meantime I’m gonna try to make it real but only to my friends and other people can to so if we wanna make it real we can but we don’t have the rights to sell it because we need to ask the developers for the copyright thing so then we are aloud to do this well one person at least and will the rest is going on I’m gonna find a way to make more cards if I can but overall this game is really fun.

reviews.review_title: I love this, just wish on a few changes
reviews.review_description: I fell in love with this game I just wish 1. I could change the writing on the cards to English, if you can then I apologize but when you start it, it’s in a different language 2. This feels like a beta or early release there’s only 3 levels so if you play the cards right you can beat the those 3 very fast I hope this game continues to grow and get updates fast I could see myself playing this game for awhile

reviews.review_title: Super fun with really fun battle system
reviews.review_description: The game isn't even in English but I could easily understand how to play the game and what did what. The instructions are very good and game allows for really fun strategy! Overall a fun experience and has lots of potential. Even though it's in beta the game has decent variety on the playthroughs and feels kinda rouge like rn. I recommend giving it a go!

This game is so good, it’s very short and only in Japanese but very easy to learn and fun to play, I’m hoping they continue to develop this game or a game like it. I would pay $60 for a longer version of this
This game is really cool. I just wish that there was an English version.
